title: Homepage enhancements, timer page, bottom nav bar, and motivational target widget

requirements.text: Display a 'Days Left to End of Month' countdown banner at the very top of the homepage (Dashboard). Calculate the number of days remaining in the current calendar month and show it prominently (e.g., '12 days left in this month').

quotes: In the top of homepage the days left will be written to end month

acceptanceCriteria: The days-left count is shown at the top of the Dashboard page
The number updates correctly as the date changes
The banner is visually distinct and easy to read

requirements.text: On the homepage (Dashboard), show a section that lists the user's upcoming reminders and active targets so they are immediately visible without navigating away. Pull data from existing localStorage reminders and targets. Show title, deadline/time, and a short status indicator for each item.

quotes: If a student will add a target or reminder then that target or reminder will come to homepage so that user can easily remember

acceptanceCriteria: Reminders and targets added by the user appear on the homepage
Each item shows its title and due date/time
Section updates reactively when items are added or removed

requirements.text: Add a calendar-clock icon button in the top-right area of the homepage header, positioned beside the existing message icon. Tapping this icon navigates the user to a new Timer/Countdown page.

quotes: Add a calendar clock icon in top right corner beside message icon . This icon will open a page

acceptanceCriteria: A calendar-clock icon is visible in the top-right header beside the message icon
Tapping the icon navigates to the Timer page
The icon is accessible on all screen sizes

requirements.text: Create a new Timer/Countdown page reachable from the calendar-clock icon. The page must: (1) Allow adding a new timer with a 'Start' date field (month + day) and an 'End' date field (year + month + day). (2) After saving, display a live countdown showing months, days, hours, and minutes remaining until the End date in large, prominent text. (3) Support multiple simultaneous timers listed on the page. (4) Each timer entry shows its label/end-date and live countdown. (5) Provide a delete option for each timer.

quotes: there will be two sections to fill one when to start(in months and days ) and when to end (in years months days) after saving it a timer will start which show month day date hrs min left
the timer will be in big size showing left months days hrs min etc
there will be option of multiple timer set

acceptanceCriteria: User can open an 'Add Timer' form with start (month/day) and end (year/month/day) inputs
Saved timers display a large live countdown in months, days, hours, minutes
Multiple timers can be active simultaneously
Timers persist across page refreshes (localStorage)
Each timer can be deleted individually

requirements.text: Add a persistent bottom navigation bar that is visible on every page of the app. The bar must contain five buttons with icons and labels: Home, Subject, Question, Reminder, and Target. Each button navigates to its corresponding page. The bar must remain fixed at the bottom of the screen and not be hidden by page content.

quotes: Add subject, question, reminder,target and home button to bottom of the screen which always be there in every page to easily access these buttons for the user

acceptanceCriteria: Bottom navigation bar is visible and fixed on every authenticated page
Five buttons: Home, Subject, Question, Reminder, Target — each with an icon and label
Each button navigates correctly to the respective page
Active page button is highlighted
The bar does not overlap main page content (page content has bottom padding)

requirements.text: Add a 'Target 🎯 100%' motivational widget on the homepage (Dashboard). Style it with a bold, winner/champion aesthetic — use gold/trophy colors, celebratory typography, and an energetic design to keep students motivated. Show the user's current overall target completion percentage and a message encouraging them to reach 100%.

quotes: Add Target 🎯 100 percent widget in home screen with attractive and winner look so that students will always be motivated

acceptanceCriteria: A Target 🎯 widget is visible on the homepage
It displays the user's current target completion percentage
The widget uses gold, trophy, or championship-themed colors and design
It includes a motivational message encouraging 100% completion
The widget updates when targets are completed

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
All data persistence must use the existing localStorage service (localStorageService.ts)
Timer page and bottom nav must integrate with the existing TanStack Router route structure in App.tsx
nonGoals: Backend changes — all new features are frontend/localStorage only
Real-time sync or push notifications for timers
Redesigning existing pages beyond adding the bottom nav bar and homepage sections
